Overview And Setup¶

This project is a Flask dashboard for GradCafe admissions analysis.

Environment Variables¶

DATABASE_URL

PostgreSQL connection string.

Example:

export DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:181818@127.0.0.1:5432/gradcafe_db_v2"

Run App¶

cd Module_4
python src/app.py

Run Tests¶

cd Module_4
python -m pytest
